description:
All 3 block diagram samples show warnings:
- block_layout: rect count (16 vs 32), z_order issue (shapes rendered after text)
- block_shapes: rect count (16 vs 32), text count differs, z_order issue
- block_spacing: rect count (6 vs 12), z_order issue

Visual similarity ranges from 28.9% to 50.4%. Blocks are missing (half expected count). Z-order issue: text is rendered before shapes so may be hidden behind them. Check src/diagrams/block/ against reference.
notes: Block layout differences are fundamental - nodes positioned differently than mermaid.js reference. Composite block sizing and nested block layout need work. Edge attachment sides are also incorrect (edges connect to wrong sides of blocks).
title: block: Rect count mismatch and z-order issues
